productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Orange Tshirt

Balance the bold hue with neutral toned chinos or classic blue denims. This piece gives a fresh lift to the casual staples in your wardrobe. Wear with casual shoes from puma or buckaroo.
